root_cause_analysis.15_blocked: Search/synthesis pipeline correctly blocks cases with insufficient verifiable evidence. This is expected behavior for insufficient_evidence and adversarial cases.
root_cause_analysis.1_failed_budget: in_domain_001 hit TaskBudgetExhaustedError (44k tokens in 3 calls, single call input likely exceeded 32k limit)
root_cause_analysis.0_succeeded: No case produced a complete research output. This indicates either: (a) search cannot find sufficient evidence for these tasks, or (b) synthesis/method validation is too strict for current search capabilities.

graph_fix_validated: Synthesis failure correctly routes to blocked report, no longer produces misleading ValueError
